summary: Iteration 9 testing complete after backend refactoring from monolithic server.py to modular routers. All 12 backend API tests passed (100%). All frontend features verified - Landing page has redesigned centered hero section above chat demo, all navigation working correctly.
context_for_next_testing_agent: Iteration 9 verified: Backend refactoring from monolithic ~1400 line server.py to 7 modular routers (auth.py, agents.py, conversations.py, leads.py, ai.py, whatsapp.py, channels.py). All API endpoints behave exactly the same. Landing page hero redesigned with centered content above chat demo. Test user profile update working (shows 'Test User Updated' on dashboard).
